title: Hi beloved mine, welcome to Our Wrapped
January - a New Year for both of us
text: It was our first January together, maybe it was a though one, you got a new job, I didn't have one, but we had each other, maybe that's what mattered the most and well, we made it through - thought we didn't get the chance to go out much.

title: February - Other Quiet Month
text: Well, three months have passed since we started dating. I got the job, you became more comfortable at yours, and this month Jisoo released a song called Earthquick. I remember how excited you were about it. It was a quiet month again, and I didn’t have much money to take you out and believe, remembering that makes me so dad
March - I told my mom
title: Can you believe this? You probably don’t remember when I told you about it, but this month I took my mom out and told her about our relationship. I was really scared — it was my first time talking about something like that. I felt happy and very afraid at the same time
Abril - Fin de Semana
text: Pequeñas aventuras que ahora son grandes recuerdos.

title: Mayo - Noche de Cine
text: Popcorn, cobija y tu mano en la mía.

title: Junio - Un Regalo
text: Ese detalle inesperado que aún conservo.

title: Julio - Playa
text: El atardecer, las risas y la sal en el pelo.

title: Agosto - Viaje Corto
text: Un par de días que nos bastaron para desconectar.

title: Septiembre - Cocina
text: Intentamos cocinar y terminamos pidiendo pizza.

title: Noviembre - Paseo
text: Regresamos a ese café que tanto nos gustó.

title: Diciembre - Lo Mejor del Año
text: Cerramos el año juntos: gracias por tanto.
